case_title: QUIROZ, MARIA ISABEL VS ARANDA, MARTHA L

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY QUIROZ, MARIA ISABEL AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, MARTHA L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF MARIA ISABEL QUIROZ WILL BE STEPHEN ENOCH.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO MARTHA ARANDA, 282 SILVER STREET,SF,CA 94112
INFORMATION REQUESTED BY THE COURT FILED BY DEFENDANT. COPIES OF BANK STATEMENT FOR ALL BANK ACCOUNTS ON WHICH MARTHA ARANDA HAS HER
NAME, FOR MONTHS 10, 11, 12-2006; 1, 2, 3-2007; ON OR BEFORE APRIL 27,2007.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-23-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISCHARGED. DEFENDANT COMPLIED BY SENDING IN BANK STATEMENTS WHICH WERE PROVIDED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR ON 5-8-2007 BY MAIL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUIROZ, MARIA ISABEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARANDA, MARTHA L $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2006, CONTINUED FROM NOV-16-2006 TO JAN-11-2007 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, MARTHA L
THE ABOVE PAPERS WERE GIVEN TO D. CARTER FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT. REQUESTED BY COMMISSIONER ON THE 4/23/07 OEX HEARING.
NEEDS SPANISH INTERPRETER. APPLICATION & ORDER FOR FEE WAIVER-GRANTED.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, MARTHA L HEARING SET FOR NOV-16-2006 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2007, CONTINUED FROM JAN-11-2007 TO MAR-19-2007 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, MARTHA L
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2007, CONTINUED FROM MAR-19-2007 TO APR-23-2007 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, MARTHA L
